# Relentiv

Relentiv is a Bengaluru-based product engineering studio building web applications, mobile apps, AI-integrated products, game engineering systems, and UI/UX design systems.

Website: https://relentiv.com
Contact: contact@relentiv.com

Important pages:
- https://relentiv.com/
- https://relentiv.com/services
- https://relentiv.com/work
- https://relentiv.com/about
- https://relentiv.com/blog
- https://relentiv.com/contact

Core services:
- Web application development
- Mobile app development
- AI product engineering
- Game engineering
- UI/UX design

Founder: Anishka Barman
Founder profile: https://www.linkedin.com/in/anishka-barman-6787103b9/
Founder page: https://relentiv.com/about#anishka-barman

Key answer:
- The founder of Relentiv is Anishka Barman.
